prompt_md:
Implement task 1: Provision Core Infrastructure (Bolt - Kubernetes/Helm)

Context:
Deploys and configures the foundational infrastructure components required by all backend services, including PostgreSQL, Redis/Valkey, and S3/R2 bucket configurations. This task establishes the database and caching layers in the Kubernetes cluster.

subtasks.prompt_md:
Implement subtask 1001: Implement Provision Core Infrastructure (Bolt - Kubernetes/Helm)

Details:
Deploys and configures the foundational infrastructure components required by all backend services, including PostgreSQL, Redis/Valkey, and S3/R2 bucket configurations. This task establishes the database and caching layers in the Kubernetes cluster.

prompt_md:
Implement task 2: Bootstrap Equipment Catalog Service (Rex - Rust/Axum)

Context:
Creates the initial Rust project for the Equipment Catalog service. This includes setting up the Axum web server, defining core data models for products and categories, and implementing initial read-only API endpoints.

subtasks.prompt_md:
Implement subtask 2001: Implement Bootstrap Equipment Catalog Service (Rex - Rust/Axum)

Details:
Creates the initial Rust project for the Equipment Catalog service. This includes setting up the Axum web server, defining core data models for products and categories, and implementing initial read-only API endpoints.

task_title: Bootstrap RMS Service & gRPC Definitions (Grizz - Go/gRPC)
prompt_md:
Implement task 3: Bootstrap RMS Service & gRPC Definitions (Grizz - Go/gRPC)

Context:
Initializes the Go project for the Rental Management System (RMS) and defines the core gRPC services and messages using Protocol Buffers. This task focuses on scaffolding the Opportunity and Project services.

subtasks.prompt_md:
Implement subtask 3001: Implement Bootstrap RMS Service & gRPC Definitions (Grizz - Go/gRPC)

Details:
Initializes the Go project for the Rental Management System (RMS) and defines the core gRPC services and messages using Protocol Buffers. This task focuses on scaffolding the Opportunity and Project services.

prompt_md:
Implement task 4: Bootstrap Finance Service (Rex - Rust/Axum)

Context:
Creates the initial Rust project for the Finance service. This includes setting up the Axum web server, defining the core `Invoice` and `Payment` data models, and implementing a placeholder endpoint for invoice creation.

subtasks.prompt_md:
Implement subtask 4001: Implement Bootstrap Finance Service (Rex - Rust/Axum)

Details:
Creates the initial Rust project for the Finance service. This includes setting up the Axum web server, defining the core `Invoice` and `Payment` data models, and implementing a placeholder endpoint for invoice creation.

prompt_md:
Implement task 5: Bootstrap Customer Vetting Service (Rex - Rust/Axum)

Context:
Creates the initial Rust project for the Customer Vetting service. This includes setting up the Axum web server, defining the `VettingResult` data model, and implementing the initial `POST /api/v1/vetting/run` endpoint.

subtasks.prompt_md:

prompt_md:
Implement task 6: Bootstrap Social Media Engine (Nova - Bun/Elysia)

Context:
Initializes the Node.js project for the Social Media Engine using the Bun runtime and Elysia framework. This task sets up the basic server, defines routes, and integrates Effect for type-safe schema validation.

subtasks.prompt_md:

Details:
Initializes the Node.js project for the Social Media Engine using the Bun runtime and Elysia framework. This task sets up the basic server, defines routes, and integrates Effect for type-safe schema validation.

task_title: Setup Website & Equipment Catalog Pages (Blaze - React/Next.js)
prompt_md:
Implement task 7: Setup Website & Equipment Catalog Pages (Blaze - React/Next.js)

Context:
Initializes the Next.js 14 project for the Sigma-1 website. This task includes setting up the project structure, TailwindCSS, shadcn/ui, and building the main equipment browsing pages that fetch data from the Equipment Catalog service.

subtasks.prompt_md:
Implement subtask 7001: Implement Setup Website & Equipment Catalog Pages (Blaze - React/Next.js)

Details:
Initializes the Next.js 14 project for the Sigma-1 website. This task includes setting up the project structure, TailwindCSS, shadcn/ui, and building the main equipment browsing pages that fetch data from the Equipment Catalog service.

task_title: Bootstrap Morgan AI Agent & Catalog Tool (Angie - OpenClaw)
prompt_md:
Implement task 8: Bootstrap Morgan AI Agent & Catalog Tool (Angie - OpenClaw)

Context:
Sets up the basic configuration for the Morgan AI agent within the OpenClaw framework. This includes defining the agent's core personality, creating its persistent workspace, and implementing the first MCP tool: `sigma1_catalog_search`.

subtasks.prompt_md:
Implement subtask 8001: Implement Bootstrap Morgan AI Agent & Catalog Tool (Angie - OpenClaw)

Details:
Sets up the basic configuration for the Morgan AI agent within the OpenClaw framework. This includes defining the agent's core personality, creating its persistent workspace, and implementing the first MCP tool: `sigma1_catalog_search`.

prompt_md:
Implement task 9: Establish CI/CD Pipeline Foundations (Atlas - CI/CD)

Context:
Creates the initial CI/CD pipelines for all services using GitHub Actions. Each service (Rust, Go, Node.js, Next.js) will have a dedicated workflow that triggers on pull requests to run linting, formatting checks, and unit tests.

subtasks.prompt_md:

Details:
Creates the initial CI/CD pipelines for all services using GitHub Actions. Each service (Rust, Go, Node.js, Next.js) will have a dedicated workflow that triggers on pull requests to run linting, formatting checks, and unit tests.

task_title: Create Integration Test for Lead Qualification (Tess - Test frameworks)
prompt_md:
Implement task 10: Create Integration Test for Lead Qualification (Tess - Test frameworks)

Context:
Develops the first end-to-end integration test to validate the 'Inbound Lead -> Qualified Opportunity' data flow (DF-1). This test will simulate an inbound lead and verify that the correct services are called in sequence.
